intro: Neobesseya notesteinii is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as gentian or gentianella. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Neobesseya notesteinii include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
